name: Goa Beachfront Family Villa
vibe_description: Spacious and family-friendly beach villa in Goa, perfect for a memorable family trip. Features a private swimming pool, beachfront lawn, fully equipped kitchen, and kids play area.

name: Cozy Swiss Alps Mountain Cabin
vibe_description: Cozy rustic cabin nestled deep in the snowy mountains. Warm up by the stone fireplace, relax in the outdoor hot tub, and enjoy panoramic views of the Swiss peaks.

name: Romantic Parisian Balcony Stay
vibe_description: A romantic Parisian apartment with a classic French balcony offering gorgeous city views, perfect for couples looking for an intimate getaway in the City of Light.

name: Budget Tokyo Micro Studio
vibe_description: An affordable, modern, and compact budget studio in the heart of Tokyo. Ideal for solo travelers, digital nomads, and budget-conscious explorers.

name: Luxury Maldives Overwater Villa
vibe_description: A stunning luxury overwater villa in the Maldives suspended over crystal clear turquoise waters. Features a private plunge pool, sun deck, and direct lagoon access.

name: Serengeti Wilderness Safari Lodge
vibe_description: An authentic safari lodge in the African wilderness. Enjoy stunning views of the savannah, animal sightings from the outdoor deck, and cozy bonfire nights.
